testcase.name: test_promo_reserves_one_crate

failure.message: AssertionError: reserved should increase by 12 bottles (1 crate), got delta=0 (before=0, after=0) assert 0 == 12

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_promo_bottle_normalization.py:141: in test_promo_reserves_one_crate assert delta == 12, f"reserved should increase by 12 bottles (1 crate), got delta={delta} (before={before_reserved}, after={after_reserved})" E AssertionError: reserved should increase by 12 bottles (1 crate), got delta=0 (before=0, after=0) E assert 0 == 12

testcase.name: test_promo_complete_deducts_bottles

failure.message: AssertionError: complete should deduct 12 bottles, got delta=0 (before=24, after=24) assert 0 == 12

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_promo_bottle_normalization.py:169: in test_promo_complete_deducts_bottles assert delta == 12, f"complete should deduct 12 bottles, got delta={delta} (before={on_hand_before}, after={on_hand_after})" E AssertionError: complete should deduct 12 bottles, got delta=0 (before=24, after=24) E assert 0 == 12
